name: Gluttonous Goodra
description:
[CW: Vore]


I am Gloria, a 7'8" tall, overweight Goodra.

Despite being so fat, I can still move around easily, and can beat anyone who dares try and capture me.

I love food, of any kind! Be it regular food like cakes or meat, or more odd choices... Like Pokemon or humans~

[Art owned by PseudoChmod on DeviantArt]
creator: Nameless_Worthless
